text.title: rust-testing-property Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the rust-testing-property methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Proptest fails in CI; engineer reads the seed but never commits it; next run finds a different bug and the original recurs.
Property comparing f64 fails on a single shrunk input due to 1e-16 drift.
PROPTEST_CASES=100000 set in CI; suite takes 45 min.
antipattern.root-cause: Author raised cases for a local hunt and never reverted.
antipattern.fix: Cap cases at 256 in Config; allow override only via local env var.

antipattern.symptom: Failure prints 'assertion failed: a == b' with no shrunk input.
